ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.
Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine.
La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes
Place one nicotine pouch under your
upper lip and leave for up to 1 hour.
This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.
Ce produit peut ne pas vous convenir. Toujours lire l'étiquette et suivre le mode d'emploi.

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows an outdoor photo of a person in a grey hoodie and yellow hat holding a green object, with instructional text about how to use a nicotine pouch. Regulatory warnings and age restriction icons are clearly visible. No ZONNIC logo or halo elements are present in the marketing asset.

Regulatory warnings and age restriction icons are clearly visible. No ZONNIC logo or halo elements are present in the marketing asset.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: NO

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: NO
  ⚠ NO HALO DETECTED ON ANY LETTER — LOGO-DONT-01 VIOLATION

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: light_image

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features an outdoor scene with a person in a grey hoodie and yellow hat holding a green object, accompanied by clear instructional text on how to use a nicotine pouch. The background is a light image with sky and buildings, and no ZONNIC logo or halo elements are present. Regulatory elements are fully visible: the bilingual nicotine warning is at the top, the 18+ icon is at the bottom left, and the risk communication text is at the bottom. The fonts used are bold and regular sans-serif, matching the brand's Santral typeface requirements. Secondary colours (green and yellow) are used as accent elements, not as dominant backgrounds. This image follows brand guidelines for educational content, which allows the absence of the logo and halo, and all regulatory requirements are met. Overall, the asset is visually clear, informative, and compliant with both brand and legal standards.
